overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit wooden attic bedroom in a horror-style video game. The camera slowly pans left across vintage furniture and patterned rugs, with warm lamplight illuminating the traditional wooden interior while dark night is visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden attic bedroom with vintage furniture

agents.ego_description: standing still and slowly panning the camera left to survey the dimly lit attic room

entered.detail: large white wooden wardrobe with two doors and bottom drawers
dark wooden desk with items on top against the left wall
green shaded desk lamp providing warm illumination
tall multi-paned window showing dark night outside
dark patterned area rug covering the wooden floor
wooden bed frame with white bedding visible in foreground
framed picture hanging on the wall above the desk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit wooden attic bedroom. A large white armoire stands centrally while a wooden writing desk with a green banker's lamp glows warmly to the left. To the right, a tall window reveals the dark night outside. The camera slowly begins panning left across the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden attic bedroom left side with railing and small window

events.description: camera pans left revealing the left wall with small attic window and wooden railing

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left, focusing on the small attic window and wooden railing on the left wall

entered.detail: small square window with multiple panes showing dark night outside
wooden banister or guard railing along the left side of the room
decorative plates hanging on the left wall near the small window

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the large window and bed exit the frame while a small attic window and wooden railing come into view on the left wall. The white armoire shifts to the right side of the frame. The warm lamplight from the desk continues to illuminate the wooden plank walls and patterned rug.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a dimly lit wooden attic bedroom, shifting focus from a window overlooking the night to the interior architectural details of the room. It begins centered on a large white armoire, with a glowing green banker's lamp on a writing desk casting a warm light to the left and a tall window revealing the dark exterior to the right. As the camera glides left, the large window and bed gradually exit the frame, causing the white armoire to shift toward the right side of the view. The scene then opens up to reveal a small attic window and a wooden railing along the left wall, while the lamplight continues to illuminate the textured wooden planks and the patterned rug below.
